/usr/bin/ar qc libpsmoveapi_static.a CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/daemon/moved_client.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/daemon/moved_monitor.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/math/psmove_alignment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/math/psmove_math.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/math/psmove_quaternion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/math/psmove_vector.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/psmove.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/psmove_calibration.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/psmove_file.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/psmove_orientation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/psmove_time.c.o CMakeFiles/psmoveapi_static.dir/src/platform/psmove_osxsupport.m.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libpsmoveapi_static.a
